title: fit-to-purpose-register
description: Stage Appropriateness (0–2), Assessor Alignment (0–2), and Ask Coherence (0–2) scores per module. Produced by scorer. Consumed by gap-analyst, qaqc-agent, output agents.

stage_appropriateness.description: 0=Misaligned with stage, 1=Partially appropriate, 2=Fully appropriate for identified funding stage

assessor_alignment.description: 0=Not calibrated for this assessor type, 1=Partially aligned, 2=Well-calibrated for the identified assessor type and priorities

ask_coherence.description: 0=Content does not support the ask, 1=Partially supportive, 2=Content coherently supports the stated ask

combined_fit_score.description: Normalised combined fit-to-purpose score for this module (0–1.0). Calculated by score_calculator.py.

fit_gap_type.description: Primary fit-to-purpose gap type if score indicates misalignment.

weighted_fit_score.description: Weighted aggregate fit-to-purpose score for this domain (0–1.0). Calculated by score_calculator.py.

overall_fit_score.description: Overall Fit-to-Purpose Track score, normalised to 0–1.0.

fit_score_percentage.description: Overall fit-to-purpose score as a percentage (0–100) for display.
